prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SMKFPMTSBHPS-2PC-MED-RD Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kid Fun Existing Title: Speed Max King 1:64 Friction Power Monster Truck Speed Boat Hauler Toy Vehicle Set Description: The Speed Max Friction Power Monster Truck Speed Boat Hauler by Kid Fun is a toy truck vehicle play set that belongs in every child's room. Combining the fun of a 10 inch friction propelled monster truck, and the cool factor of a sporty 10 inch speed boat, this toyis a gift that will be used for endless hours of fun.

The detachable trailer allows your child's creativity to run wild. Unhitch the trailer and start blazing trails with the oversize large, realistic truck, or hook it back up and help your child learn the mechanics of hauling a trailer. The easy gliding pull back friction power means the fun doesn't stop because of batteries. Does not require batteries.

Great for boys ages 3 and up. Search Terms: toy speed boat truck trailer toys carrying heavy load big wheelers 1.64 scale toys for 4 year old boys full size kids gift toy truck vehicle Features: - FRICTION POWERED BOAT HAULER - Cool toy monster truck and detachable trailer with speed boat; no batteries needed, just pull back and watch the endless hours of fun be had by young boys - OVERSIZE XL TRUCK WITH DETACHABLE TRAILER - Larger than life it self for these excitable young boys is this great gift; Monster truck measures 9 x 8 x 8 inches; Speed boat measures 10 x 6 x 4 inches - PROMOTES CREATIVITY - Children playing with this toy truck vehicle and toy speed boat learn about the basics of mechanics and promotes creativity and imagination during pretend play; toy can be used indoor and outdoor play - MONSTER TRUCK THEME - Perfect toy for kids who love big trucks, big wheelers, semi-trucks, and speed boats; 1:64 Scale, realistic and intricate details for the ultimate playtime experience - SAFE FOR KIDS - Built for kids ages 3 and up; boys can take their monster truck boat hauler with them to the park, the beach and on play dates === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
